name: anonymiser
prompt_suffix:
IMPORTANT: Generate EXACTLY these three functions and nothing else:
1. anon_token(boat_uuid) — reads device_api_key from /opt/d3kos/config/api-keys.json, returns SHA-256 HMAC of boat_uuid keyed on device_api_key (hex digest)
2. strip_position(lat, lon, precision=2) — returns dict {lat_approx: round(lat,precision), lon_approx: round(lon,precision)}
3. strip_vessel_name(data) — removes keys 'name','vessel_name','mmsi','callsign' from dict data, returns modified dict
Do NOT generate any other functions, classes, test data, or main block. Just these three functions with imports (import hashlib, hmac, json).

name: community-api
spec_section: Sub-Feature 4: Hazard and POI Marker Submission
prompt_suffix:
IMPORTANT: Generate a Flask service (port 8095) with EXACTLY these two routes:
1. POST /api/community/marker — reads JSON body (category, description, lat, lon), checks /opt/d3kos/config/community-prefs.json for hazard_reporting=true, anonymises position (round to 2dp), forwards to https://atmyboat.com/api/community/markers via requests.post, returns {ok:true} or error
2. GET /api/community/markers — reads bbox query param, proxies GET https://atmyboat.com/api/community/markers?bbox=... and returns the result
Both routes must return 503 if community-prefs.json hazard_reporting is false. Import: from flask import Flask,jsonify,request; import requests,json,os; from anonymiser import strip_position

name: community-prefs-settings
prompt_suffix:
Insert a new Community & Privacy settings section BEFORE the Data Management header. Generate a `

Community & Privacy

` section containing 4 toggle checkboxes with labels: 'Share engine benchmarks (anonymous fleet comparison)', 'Show my boat on community map (approx. 1 km grid)', 'Enable hazard/POI reporting from nav page', 'Help improve the knowledge base (issue category only)'. Each checkbox has an id (benchmark_sharing, boat_map, hazard_reporting, knowledge_base) and onchange that calls saveCommunityPref(this.id, this.checked). All start unchecked. Style to match existing setting-card divs in the page. Return only the HTML to insert — no FIND_LINE, no END_LINE, no wrapper.

name: community-engine-benchmark
community-boat-map
community-knowledge-log
prompt_suffix: Generate a valid Node-RED flow JSON array. Each node object requires: id (unique 8-char hex string), type, name, wires (array of arrays). Flow must start with a tab node (type='tab'). Use these node types: tab, inject, function, http request, watch, change. The watch node monitors a file path. The http request node posts JSON to the URL. Return only the JSON array — no explanation, no fences.

name: hazard-poi-ui
spec_section: Sub-Feature 4: Hazard and POI Marker Submission
prompt_suffix: Insert a 'Report Hazard / POI' button and bottom sheet modal BEFORE the i18n.js script tag. The button is a floating action button (position:fixed, bottom:80px, right:20px, z-index:500, background:#FF6600) with text '⚠ Report'. Clicking it opens a bottom sheet div (id='hazard-sheet', position:fixed, bottom:0, left:0, right:0, z-index:600, background:#1a1a1a, padding:20px) containing: a category <select> with options (Hazard, Shallow, Fuel, Anchorage, Marina, Other), a text <input> for description (max 80 chars), a Submit button that calls submitHazardReport(), and a Cancel button that hides the sheet. Also include a <script> block with submitHazardReport() that POSTs {category, description, lat: currentLat, lon: currentLon} to http://localhost:8095/api/community/marker (use existing gpsLat/gpsLon variables from page scope if available, else 0). Return only the HTML+script to insert.
